---
title: |
  | The circumpolar distribution of Antarctic seafloor biodiversity hotspots
subtitle: |
  | Supplementary Information
  | Predicted probability of occurrence for major taxonomic groups and 83 individual Antarctic benthic morphospecies
author: "Jansen et al."
output:
  pdf_document:
    keep_md: yes
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, echo=FALSE,
                      dev='png', fig.height=10, fig.width=10, dpi=300,
                      fig.path='display_predictive_maps_figures/') 

############################################################
# USER OPTIONS
############################################################
usr <- "JJ"

# Toggle writing figures to file
pngs <- FALSE
pdfs <- FALSE

# Spatial resolution
res <- "2km"

# Select the model folder to display in this report
# Examples:
#   "fam_cafe", "fam_cbpm", "fam_eppl", "fam_vpmg",
#   "npp_cafe", "npp_cbpm", "npp_eppl", "npp_vpmg"
model_id <- "npp_and_fam_cafe"

# Plot export settings
png.height <- 2400
png.width  <- 2400
png.res    <- 300
pdf.height <- 8
pdf.width  <- 8

############################################################
# LOAD SHARED PROJECT SETUP FILES
############################################################
# Look for 0_SourceFile.R and 0_Functions.R either in the current folder or one level above.
source_file <- if (file.exists("0_SourceFile.R")) {"0_SourceFile.R"
} else if (file.exists(file.path("..", "0_SourceFile.R"))) {file.path("..", "0_SourceFile.R")}

functions_file <- if (file.exists("0_Functions.R")) {"0_Functions.R"
} else if (file.exists(file.path("..", "0_Functions.R"))) {file.path("..", "0_Functions.R")}

source(source_file)
source(functions_file)

############################################################
# PACKAGES
############################################################
library(terra)
library(SOmap)
library(viridis)
library(knitr)
library(RColorBrewer)

############################################################
# DIRECTORY DEFINITIONS
############################################################
# Environmental rasters
env.derived <- file.path(usr.dropbox.dir,
  "data_environmental/derived")

# Predictive-map root directory
pred.dir <- file.path(usr.dropbox.dir,
  "data_products/predictive_maps/circum_antarctic")

# Model-specific directory containing species maps and total abundance
pred.model.dir <- file.path(pred.dir, paste0("hmsc_with_", model_id))

# Directory for individual morphospecies figures
export.dir <- file.path(usr.dropbox.dir,
  "data_products/publication_figures/JansenEtAl", model_id, "taxa/")

#base.str <- "2km_model_cells_hmsc_"

# Load all PA raster files for the selected model
pa.files <- list.files(pred.model.dir, pattern = "^PA_.*\\.tif$", full.names = TRUE)
if (length(pa.files) == 0) {stop("No PA_*.tif files found in: ", pred.model.dir)}

# Load only the layers needed in this document:
# 1 = mean, 2 = median, 3 = standard error
hmsc.maps.pa.env.mean   <- rast(pa.files, lyrs = 1)
hmsc.maps.pa.env.median <- rast(pa.files, lyrs = 2)
hmsc.maps.pa.env.se     <- rast(pa.files, lyrs = 3)
hmsc.maps.pa.env.05     <- rast(pa.files, lyrs = 4)
hmsc.maps.pa.env.95     <- rast(pa.files, lyrs = 5)

############################################################
# LOAD VARIABLES AND SETTINGS
############################################################
setup1_file <- if (file.exists("b2_setup1_JansenEtAl2026.R")) {"b2_setup1_JansenEtAl2026.R"
} else if (file.exists(file.path("biodiversity", "b2_setup1_JansenEtAl2026.R"))) {file.path("biodiversity", "b2_setup1_JansenEtAl2026.R")}

source(setup1_file)
```

## Individual P/A maps {.tabset}

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
## clean up names
sp.names <- gsub("Biota - ","",names(hmsc.maps.pa.env.median))
sp.names <- gsub("_median","",sp.names)
sp.names <- gsub("Bryozoa_Cnidaria","Bryozoa Cnidaria",sp.names)
sp.names <- gsub("Bryozoa_Cnidaria_Sponge","Bryozoa Cnidaria Sponge",sp.names)
sp.names <- gsub("_"," - ",sp.names)
sp.names <- gsub("."," ",sp.names, fixed=TRUE)

## filenames
f.names <- paste0("Circumpolar_pa_median_",names(hmsc.maps.pa.env.median),".png")
if(pngs){
  for(i in 1:nlyr(hmsc.maps.pa.env.median)){
    ra <- hmsc.maps.pa.env.median[[i]]
    ## extract, zoom and shift inset maps
    crop_and_shift(ra)
     #### plot everything
    png(file.path(export.dir,f.names[i]), width=png.width, height=png.height, res=png.res)
    par(plot.par)
    plot(ra, main=sp.names[i], col=cols.c.power, axes=FALSE, plg=plg.c, range=range.pa, loc.main=loc.main, xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, maxcell=maxcell)
    text(x=l.x2, y=l.y2, labels="Probability of presence")
    add.plotsandlines(inset.cols=cols.c.power, plot.points=FALSE, range=range.pa)
    dev.off()
  }
}

f.names.se <- paste0("Circumpolar_pa_se_",names(hmsc.maps.pa.env.se),".png")
if(pngs){
  for(i in 1:nlyr(hmsc.maps.pa.env.se)){
    ra <- hmsc.maps.pa.env.se[[i]]
    max.se <- minmax(ra)[2]
    if(max.se>1){max.se <- 1}
    if(max.se<0.01){max.se <- 0.01}
    range.se <- c(0, max.se)
    ## extract, zoom and shift inset maps
    crop_and_shift(ra)
     #### plot everything
    png(file.path(export.dir,f.names.se[i]), width=png.width, height=png.height, res=png.res)
    par(plot.par)
    plot(ra, col=rev(cols.grey), axes=FALSE, plg=plg.c, loc.main=loc.main, range=range.se)
    text(x=l.x2, y=l.y2, labels="Standard error")
    add.plotsandlines(inset.cols=rev(cols.grey), plot.points=FALSE, range=range.se)
    dev.off()
  }
}

hmsc.maps.pa.env.025 <- hmsc.maps.pa.env.05[[grep("_5$", names(hmsc.maps.pa.env.05))]]
f.names.025 <- paste0("Circumpolar_pa_025_",names(hmsc.maps.pa.env.025),".png")
## remove the "_5" in the names
f.names.025 <- gsub("_5", "", f.names.025)
if(pngs){
  for(i in 1:nlyr(hmsc.maps.pa.env.025)){
    ra <- hmsc.maps.pa.env.025[[i]]
    # max.025 <- minmax(ra)[2]
    # if(max.025>1){max.025 <- 1}
    # if(max.025<0.01){max.025 <- 0.01}
    # range.025 <- c(0, max.025)
    ## extract, zoom and shift inset maps
    crop_and_shift(ra)
     #### plot everything
    png(file.path(export.dir,f.names.025[i]), width=png.width, height=png.height, res=png.res)
    par(plot.par)
    plot(ra, col=rev(cols.grey), axes=FALSE, plg=plg.c, loc.main=loc.main, range=range.pa)
    text(x=l.x2, y=l.y2, labels="Lower credible interval (2.5%)")
    add.plotsandlines(inset.cols=rev(cols.grey), plot.points=FALSE, range=range.pa)
    dev.off()
  }
}

hmsc.maps.pa.env.975 <- hmsc.maps.pa.env.95[[grep("_95$", names(hmsc.maps.pa.env.95))]]
f.names.975 <- paste0("Circumpolar_pa_975_",names(hmsc.maps.pa.env.975),".png")
## remove the "_95" in the names
f.names.975 <- gsub("_95", "", f.names.975)
if(pngs){
  for(i in 1:nlyr(hmsc.maps.pa.env.975)){
    ra <- hmsc.maps.pa.env.975[[i]]
    # max.025 <- minmax(ra)[2]
    # if(max.025>1){max.025 <- 1}
    # if(max.025<0.01){max.025 <- 0.01}
    # range.025 <- c(0, max.025)
    ## extract, zoom and shift inset maps
    crop_and_shift(ra)
     #### plot everything
    png(file.path(export.dir,f.names.975[i]), width=png.width, height=png.height, res=png.res)
    par(plot.par)
    plot(ra, col=rev(cols.grey), axes=FALSE, plg=plg.c, loc.main=loc.main, range=range.pa)
    text(x=l.x2, y=l.y2, labels="Upper credible interval (97.5%)")
    add.plotsandlines(inset.cols=rev(cols.grey), plot.points=FALSE, range=range.pa)
    dev.off()
  }
}

#   
# ## Create tabs and embed images
# for (i in 1:nlyr(hmsc.maps.pa.env.median)) {
#   cat(paste0("### ", i, "\n"))
#   cat(paste0("<img src='", f.names[i], "' alt='", gsub(".png", "", f.names[i]), "'>\n\n"))
# }
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
## sorting plots by higher taxonomic groups
group.names <- c("Ascidians", "Bryozoa", "Cnidaria", "Echinoderms", "Porifera", "Other")
group.ids <- list(
  c(1:7), # Ascidians
  c(8:18), # Bryozoa
  c(19:33), # Cnidaria
  c(37:50), # Echinoderms
  c(65:79), # Porifera
  c(34:36,51:64,80:82) # Other
)

## Create tabs and embed images
for(k in 1:2){#length(group.names)){
  cat(paste0("### ", group.names[k], " {.tabset}\n"))
  for(i in 1:3){#length(group.ids[[k]])){

   j <- group.ids[[k]][i]
    chunk <- paste0(
      "#### ", i, "\n\n",
      "```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.align='center'}\n",
      "knitr::include_graphics('", f.names[j], "')\n",
      "knitr::include_graphics('", f.names.025[j], "')\n",
      "knitr::include_graphics('", f.names.975[j], "')\n",
      "```\n\n"
    )
    cat(knitr::asis_output(chunk))
  }
}



```
